CustomField.description: Controls how manual resume behaves for this agent. LLM First hands control back to the model to reassess the failure and choose the next action. Retry Failed Operation retries the last failed operation first, then continues.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: LLM First: resume by asking the model to reassess the failure and choose the next action. Retry Failed Operation: retry the last failed operation first, then continue.
CustomField.label: Resume Mode
